title: SwapBuildResponse (#269)
description: Extended POST /v1/build/swap response. Adds cborHex + report + buildFailure to the #263 baseline. All new fields are nullable so existing consumers that only read intentJson keep working unchanged.

intentJson.description: The typed SwapIntent serialised to JSON. Present iff intent assembly succeeded.

intentFailure.description: Typed failure from buildSwapIntent. Present iff intent assembly failed.

cborHex.description: Hex-encoded unsigned Conway tx body. Present iff both intent assembly AND tx build succeeded.

report.description: Build Report (txid, fee, exUnits per script, redeemer indexes, etc). Present iff tx build succeeded.

buildFailure.description: Typed failure from buildSwapTx. Present iff intent assembly succeeded but tx build failed.

internalError.description: Untyped escape hatch for catastrophic failures (try @SomeException backstop). Present iff no other arm matched. Should be empty in production once the typed surface is complete.

cliCommand.description: Copy-paste recipe — the equivalent `amaru-treasury-tx ...` shell invocation for the request body.  Deterministic from the request alone; always populated.

allOf.description: Exactly one of {intentFailure, buildFailure, internalError} is non-null on a failure; on success all three are null and the success fields are populated.

tag.description: BuildFailure or WizardFailure constructor name, e.g. WalletUnderfunded.

field.description: DOM `[data-field]` selector the frontend should highlight; null when no form input maps to the failure.

detail.description: One-line human-readable diagnostic, suitable for the preview status banner.
